text: Cobra Design Features 3 4 5 6 7 8 1 2 1. Self capture option (3910900093) 2. Hook and ratchet option (3910900092) 3. Side load suture/tape (accepts 2.0mm tape) 4. Laser mark: needle deployment indicator 5. Ratchet on/off (hook model only) 6. Flush port (luer lock) for cleaning 7. Needle deployment handle 8. Jaw closure trigger The first ever reusable suture passer that includes a rigid integrated stainless steel needle. 1000902685 Rev B
